title: Meta Quest Immersive Web Emulation Runtime Documentation
citation: Meta Quest, Immersive Web Emulation Runtime documentation, accessed 2026-05-04.
permitted_uses: Internal technical planning for a sidecar-only IWER emulation and visual evidence spike.
claims_supported: IWER is a browser-based WebXR emulation runtime for development and testing without a native WebXR device.
IWER documentation describes action recording and playback as useful for debugging and automated WebXR testing.
IWSDK testing guidance describes IWER injection through the `iwsdkDev` Vite plugin and keeps physical headset testing as a separate path.
claims_not_supported: IWER emulation proves Quest 3 foreground frame pacing, thermal behavior, comfort, controller latency, or in-headset readability.
IWER evidence is sufficient for production clinical simulation readiness.
